description: You are an audio mixer at a documentary production company. Create a 'UN-style voiceover' mix for a foreign language interview using the raw audio files and production brief in /home/ga/Audio/localization/. The final stereo mix must feature the translated dub offset by exactly 2.0 seconds, the original audio ducked to approximately -15 dB, and the tracks panned with the original on the left and the dub on the right. Export the final stereo mix to /home/ga/Audio/localized_export/un_style_mix.wav.
